emails.subject: Tuesday interview
emails.body: Tuesday interview Rachel, I would like very much to interview Howard but I am in Philadelphia on Tuesday. Vince

emails.subject: Re: Tuesday interview
emails.body: Re: Tuesday interview Hi Vince, Thanks for replying to my email. The scheduled interview with Howard will go ahead tomorrow, I have written to Shirley to request a convenient time for you and we will arrange for Howard to come back in for a Video Conference with you. Regards Rachel Vince J Kaminski@ECT 16/02/2001 23:42
